title: Buzzworthy White & Yellow Bee Print Insulated Lunch Bag - 15cm x 20.5cm (1 Pc.) - Made of 40% Recycled Plastic, Adorable Design for Fresh and Safe Meals All Day
features: ADORABLE BEE PRINT DESIGN: Stand out with this charming buzzworthy white & yellow bee print insulated lunch bag that adds a fun touch to your daily meal routine, making it perfect for kids and adults alike.
ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS: Made with 40% recycled plastic, this insulated lunch bag not only keeps your food fresh all day, but also contributes to a cleaner environment by reducing plastic waste.

INSULATION FOR FRESHNESS: Preserve the taste and quality of your homemade meals with our insulated lunch bag, designed to maintain the right temperature all day, preventing spoilage and maintaining freshness.

PERFECT FOR ON-THE-GO LUNCHES: With a compact size of 15cm x 20.5cm, this lightweight lunch bag easily fits in backpacks and tote bags, ensuring your meal stays safe and fresh while you're out and about.
VERSATILE USE: This stylish and functional lunch bag is great for picnics, school lunches, office meals, and more, providing a practical and eco-friendly solution for your food storage needs.
description: This insulated lunch bag will keep food safe and fresh all day long
